scripts.build: pnpm run validate:sports && turbo run build
scripts.scrape:all: pnpm run scrape:rosters && pnpm run generate:answer-pool && pnpm run scrape:nfl:fanatic && pnpm run scrape:nhl:fanatic && pnpm run scrape:nba:fanatic && pnpm run scrape:mlb:fanatic
scripts.scrape:nfl: pnpm run scrape:rosters -- --sport=nfl && pnpm run generate:answer-pool && pnpm run scrape:nfl:fanatic
scripts.scrape:nhl: pnpm run scrape:rosters -- --sport=nhl && pnpm run generate:answer-pool:nhl && pnpm run scrape:nhl:fanatic
scripts.scrape:nba: pnpm run scrape:rosters -- --sport=nba && pnpm run generate:answer-pool:nba && pnpm run scrape:nba:fanatic
scripts.scrape:mlb: pnpm run scrape:rosters -- --sport=mlb && pnpm run generate:answer-pool:mlb && pnpm run scrape:mlb:fanatic
